name: vital
description: Vital — an AI agency that takes the tech products you build to market. Specialist agents (strategy, GTM, brand, design, marketing, PR, engineering advisory, capital) plus a lead orchestrator, with skills spanning company formation and financing through launch, from positioning to press. Enterprise and mid-market focus, small business supported. Vital handles every aspect of launch except building the product; the capital discipline is advisory only, not legal or financial advice.
